docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR SEP-16-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO PLT'S ATTY. ROBERT P. GARCIA HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-1997 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT X1 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-07-1998, OFF CALENDAR DISMISSED 12/18/97
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL COVER SHEET FILED BY PLTF.
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF SEP-16-1997, OFF CALENDAR

OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-19-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON NOV-19-1997, TO FILE POS. OSC AND SANCTION AGAINST PLTF'S ATTY ROBERT P GARCIA, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-04-1997 CONTINUED FROM NOV-19-1997 TO JAN-07-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF OCEGUERA, JOAQUIN RUIZ AS TO DEFENDANT MEDINA, DANIEL REYES DOES 1 TO 20 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-10-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-11-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-22-1997
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
